trophies..validate: newData.isNumber() && ( (!data.exists() && newData.val() == 0) || newData.val() == data.val() || (newData.val() == data.val() + 1 && newData.parent().child('recentRoomId').isString() && newData.parent().child('recentRoomId').val() != data.parent().child('recentRoomId').val() && root.child('rooms/' + newData.parent().child('recentRoomId').val() + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/progress').val() >= 100 && root.child('rooms/' + newData.parent().child('recentRoomId').val() + '/settings/gridSize').val() >= 4) )
